server/seo-content.ts:221:      Many students lose points not because they don't know the math, but because of careless errors. 
server/seo-content.ts:361:        <p style="color: #555; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">The most common algebra errors students make on the SAT and how to avoid them. Stop losing easy points to careless mistakes.</p>
server/seo-content.ts:394:        When College Board announced the switch to the Digital SAT in 2024, students and parents had one big question: 
server/seo-content.ts:411:        For most students, the Digital SAT is neither harder nor easier – it's just different. The shorter passages 
server/seo-content.ts:412:        can feel less exhausting. The calculator access helps some students. The adaptive format can be stressful 
server/seo-content.ts:477:        The scoring algorithm accounts for question difficulty. A student who answers 70% of hard questions correctly

server/seo-content.ts:766:        Lyceon ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting the privacy of our users, especially students.

./supabase/migrations/20260210_mastery_v1.sql:141:  SELECT mastery_score INTO v_current_mastery
./supabase/migrations/20260210_mastery_v1.sql:142:  FROM public.student_skill_mastery

server/seo-content.ts:23:    description: "Lyceon is an AI SAT tutor that uses real SAT-style questions and step-by-step explanations to help you practice smarter, track progress, and boost your score.",
server/seo-content.ts:35:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:51:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:53:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:61:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:63:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:77:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:96:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:102:          <p style="color: #555; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Algebra, problem-solving, data analysis, geometry, and trigonometry. The Digital SAT Math section tests your ability to solve problems efficiently.</p>
server/seo-content.ts:109:          <p style="color: #555; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Reading comprehension, grammar, vocabulary in context, and rhetorical analysis. Master the skills needed for the combined Reading and Writing section.</p>
server/seo-content.ts:114:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:116:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:120:      uses adaptive testing technology, and allows calculators on the entire Math section. Reading passages are also shorter, 
server/seo-content.ts:127:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:129:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:145:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:147:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:154:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:173:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:176:      The Digital SAT Math section contains 44 questions to be completed in 70 minutes. Unlike the old paper SAT, 
server/seo-content.ts:177:      you can use a calculator on all questions. The section is divided into two modules, and your performance 
server/seo-content.ts:198:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:200:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:216:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:218:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:229:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:248:      Master the combined Reading and Writing section with AI-powered practice. 
server/seo-content.ts:253:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:256:      The Digital SAT combines Reading and Writing into one section with 54 questions in 64 minutes. 
server/seo-content.ts:258:      Like the Math section, it uses adaptive testing across two modules.
server/seo-content.ts:278:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:280:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:296:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:298:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:306:      With shorter passages and one question per text, you can move faster through the section. 
server/seo-content.ts:309:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:321:    description: "Expert SAT prep advice, study strategies, and insights from Lyceon. Learn how to improve your SAT score with practical tips for the Digital SAT.",
server/seo-content.ts:328:      SAT prep tips, study strategies, and insights to help you score higher.
server/seo-content.ts:332:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:337:        <p style="color: #555; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Breaking down the differences between the old paper SAT and the new Digital SAT format. What changed, and how does it affect your score?</p>
server/seo-content.ts:343:        <p style="color: #555; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">How does the Digital SAT calculate your score? Understanding the adaptive testing model and what it means for your preparation.</p>
server/seo-content.ts:349:        <p style="color: #555; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Don't have hours to study? Here's a focused 30-minute daily routine that can help you improve your SAT score consistently.</p>
server/seo-content.ts:365:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:367:  <section style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
server/seo-content.ts:374:  </section>
server/seo-content.ts:392:    <section style="line-height: 1.8; color: #333;">
server/seo-content.ts:401:        combines Reading and Writing into one section. Passages are shorter, questions are designed differently, 
server/seo-content.ts:405:        The adaptive format means your performance on the first module of each section determines the difficulty 
server/seo-content.ts:416:        The College Board calibrates scores so that a 1400 on the Digital SAT represents the same achievement level 
server/seo-content.ts:431:    </section>
server/seo-content.ts:447:    description: "Understanding how the Digital SAT calculates your score. Learn about adaptive testing, score ranges, and what your SAT score means for college admissions.",
server/seo-content.ts:458:    <section style="line-height: 1.8; color: #333;">
server/seo-content.ts:461:        This can be confusing when you're trying to understand your score. Here's how it actually works.
server/seo-content.ts:466:        Like the paper SAT, the Digital SAT is scored on a scale of 400-1600. You get a score from 200-800 for 
server/seo-content.ts:467:        the Math section and 200-800 for the Reading and Writing section. These two scores combine for your total.
server/seo-content.ts:472:        Each section has two modules. Your performance on the first module determines whether you get a harder 
server/seo-content.ts:478:        may score higher than someone who answers 90% of easy questions correctly. This is why you shouldn't try to 
server/seo-content.ts:491:    </section>
server/seo-content.ts:518:    <section style="line-height: 1.8; color: #333;">
server/seo-content.ts:520:        You don't need hours of free time to improve your SAT score. Consistent, focused practice of 30 minutes 
server/seo-content.ts:551:    </section>
server/seo-content.ts:567:    description: "Why practicing with real SAT-style questions is essential. Learn strategies for making the most of question bank practice to improve your score efficiently.",
server/seo-content.ts:578:    <section style="line-height: 1.8; color: #333;">
server/seo-content.ts:607:    </section>
server/seo-content.ts:623:    description: "The most common algebra errors students make on the SAT Math section. Learn how to recognize and avoid these mistakes to stop losing easy points.",
server/seo-content.ts:634:    <section style="line-height: 1.8; color: #333;">
server/seo-content.ts:680:    </section>
